[hussein_alazab_portfolio (2).html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28047832/hussein_alazab_portfolio.2.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Hussein Al-Azab | Civil Engineer</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Barlow:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@tabler/icons-webfont@latest/tabler-icons.min.css">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
:root{
  --navy:#0a0f1e;
  --steel:#1a2035;
  --accent:#e8b84b;
  --accent2:#4b9fe8;
  --light:#f0f4ff;
  --muted:#8892a4;
  --line:rgba(232,184,75,0.25);
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{background:var(--navy);color:var(--light);font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;overflow-x:hidden}
.grid-bg{
  position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(rgba(75,159,232,0.04) 1px,transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(75,159,232,0.04) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:40px 40px;
}
.container{max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 24px;position:relative;z-index:1}

/* NAV */
.nav{
  position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;
  background:rgba(10,15,30,0.92);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
}
.nav-inner{
  max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 24px;
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;height:60px;
}
.nav-logo{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:24px;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:2px;}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:28px;}
.nav-link{
  font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
  transition:color 0.2s;
}
.nav-link:hover,.nav-link.active{color:var(--accent);}

/* HERO */
.hero{
  min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;
  padding:100px 0 60px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.hero::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:-100px;right:-100px;
  width:500px;height:500px;border-radius:50%;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(232,184,75,0.08) 0%,transparent 70%);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.hero-tag{
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
  font-size:12px;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
}
.hero-tag::before{content:'';width:32px;height:1px;background:var(--accent);}
.hero-name{
  font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(52px,8vw,88px);
  line-height:0.95;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--light);margin-bottom:8px;
}
.hero-name span{color:var(--accent);}
.hero-title{
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:22px;
  letter-spacing:6px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent2);
  margin-bottom:24px;font-weight:400;
}
.hero-desc{
  font-size:15px;line-height:1.8;color:var(--muted);max-width:520px;
  margin-bottom:40px;font-weight:300;
}
.hero-stats{display:flex;gap:40px;margin-bottom:48px;}
.stat{text-align:center;}
.stat-num{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:42px;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;}
.stat-label{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px;}
.hero-cta{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.btn{
  padding:12px 28px;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;
  border:none;text-decoration:none;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  transition:all 0.25s;
}
.btn-primary{background:var(--accent);color:var(--navy);}
.btn-primary:hover{background:#f0c860;transform:translateY(-2px);}
.btn-outline{background:transparent;color:var(--light);border:1px solid rgba(240,244,255,0.2);}
.btn-outline:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);}
.hero-visual{
  position:absolute;right:-20px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
  width:320px;height:320px;opacity:0.15;pointer-events:none;
}

/* SECTIONS */
section{padding:80px 0;}
.section-label{
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
  font-size:11px;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
}
.section-label::before{content:'';width:24px;height:1px;background:var(--accent);}
.section-title{
  font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:48px;
  color:var(--light);margin-bottom:48px;letter-spacing:2px;
}
.divider{height:1px;background:var(--line);margin:0 0 0;}

/* EXPERIENCE */
.exp-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0;}
.exp-item{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:140px 1fr;gap:0;
  border-left:1px solid var(--line);padding-left:28px;
  padding-bottom:40px;position:relative;
}
.exp-item::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;left:-5px;top:6px;
  width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);
}
.exp-item:last-child{padding-bottom:0;}
.exp-year{
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:13px;
  letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--muted);padding-top:4px;text-transform:uppercase;
}
.exp-company{
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:12px;
  letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--accent2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;
}
.exp-role{
  font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:22px;
  color:var(--light);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:10px;
}
.exp-desc{font-size:14px;line-height:1.7;color:var(--muted);font-weight:300;}

/* PROJECTS */
.projects-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;}
.project-card{
  background:var(--steel);padding:28px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:all 0.3s;
}
.project-card:hover{background:#1e2640;}
.project-card::before{
  content:attr(data-num);position:absolute;right:16px;top:12px;
  font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:60px;
  color:rgba(232,184,75,0.06);pointer-events:none;letter-spacing:2px;
}
.project-tag{
  font-size:11px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--accent);font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;margin-bottom:12px;display:block;
}
.project-name{
  font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:22px;
  color:var(--light);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:10px;line-height:1.2;
}
.project-desc{font-size:13px;line-height:1.6;color:var(--muted);font-weight:300;}
.project-bar{margin-top:16px;height:2px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);}
.project-bar-fill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));}

/* SKILLS */
.skills-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;}
.skill-card{
  background:var(--steel);padding:20px;border-top:2px solid transparent;transition:all 0.3s;
}
.skill-card:hover{border-top-color:var(--accent);}
.skill-icon{
  font-size:22px;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:12px;
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;letter-spacing:1px;font-weight:700;
}
.skill-name{
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:14px;
  letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--light);margin-bottom:4px;font-weight:700;
}
.skill-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);}

/* CERTIFICATIONS */
.cert-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;}
.cert-item{
  background:var(--steel);padding:16px 20px;
  display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;
}
.cert-dot{
  width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);
  flex-shrink:0;margin-top:6px;
}
.cert-text{font-size:13px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--muted);}
.cert-year{
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:11px;
  letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--accent2);margin-top:4px;display:block;
}

/* EDUCATION */
.edu-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;}
.edu-card{background:var(--steel);padding:24px;border-left:3px solid var(--accent2);}
.edu-year{
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:12px;
  letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--accent);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;
}
.edu-degree{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:20px;color:var(--light);margin-bottom:4px;letter-spacing:1px;}
.edu-school{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);}
.edu-grade{
  display:inline-block;margin-top:10px;padding:4px 12px;
  background:rgba(232,184,75,0.1);color:var(--accent);
  font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
}

/* REFERENCES */
.ref-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;}
.ref-card{background:var(--steel);padding:20px;}
.ref-name{
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:16px;
  color:var(--light);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;
  font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px;
}
.ref-title{font-size:12px;color:var(--accent2);margin-bottom:12px;line-height:1.4;}
.ref-contact{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;}
.ref-contact span{color:var(--light);}

/* CONTACT */
.contact-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;}
.contact-item{
  background:var(--steel);padding:20px 24px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;transition:all 0.25s;
}
.contact-item:hover{background:#1e2640;}
.contact-icon{font-size:20px;color:var(--accent);width:40px;text-align:center;}
.contact-label{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:2px;}
.contact-val{font-size:14px;color:var(--light);font-weight:500;}

/* FOOTER */
footer{
  border-top:1px solid var(--line);padding:24px 0;
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
}
.footer-copy{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);}
.footer-logo{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:20px;color:var(--accent);}

/* Animations */
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.hero-tag{animation:fadeUp 0.6s ease both}
.hero-name{animation:fadeUp 0.6s 0.1s ease both}
.hero-title{animation:fadeUp 0.6s 0.2s ease both}
.hero-desc{animation:fadeUp 0.6s 0.3s ease both}
.hero-stats{animation:fadeUp 0.6s 0.4s ease both}
.hero-cta{animation:fadeUp 0.6s 0.5s ease both}

@media(max-width:600px){
  .projects-grid,.skills-grid,.edu-grid,.contact-row,.cert-grid,.ref-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .exp-item{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .hero-stats{gap:24px}
  .hero-visual{display:none}
  .nav-links{gap:14px}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="grid-bg"></div>

<nav class="nav">
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <div class="nav-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Hussein Al-Azab Logo" style="height:38px;opacity:1;"></div>
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a class="nav-link active" href="#hero">Home</a>
      <a class="nav-link" href="#experience">Experience</a>
      <a class="nav-link" href="#projects">Projects</a>
      <a class="nav-link" href="#skills">Skills</a>
      <a class="nav-link" href="#contact">Contact</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</nav>

<section class="hero" id="hero">
  <div class="container">
    <div style="margin-bottom:28px;">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Hussein Al-Azab" style="height:110px;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(232,184,75,0.4));">
</div>
<div class="hero-tag">Civil Engineer · Saudi Arabia</div>
    <div class="hero-name">Hussein<br><span>Al-Azab</span></div>
    <div class="hero-title">Civil Engineer</div>
    <div class="hero-desc">
      Civil Engineer with a Bachelor's degree from Hadramout University. Specialized in site supervision, construction management, and heritage restoration. Contributing to landmark projects across Saudi Arabia.
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div class="stat">
        <div class="stat-num">3+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Years Exp.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat">
        <div class="stat-num">4</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Major Projects</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat">
        <div class="stat-num">8+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Certifications</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a class="btn btn-primary" href="#contact">Hire Me →</a>
      <a class="btn btn-outline" href="#projects">View Projects</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-visual">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <rect x="10" y="200" width="280" height="4" fill="#e8b84b"/>
      <rect x="20" y="120" width="30" height="80" fill="#e8b84b"/>
      <rect x="60" y="80" width="30" height="120" fill="#4b9fe8"/>
      <rect x="100" y="50" width="30" height="150" fill="#e8b84b"/>
      <rect x="140" y="90" width="30" height="110" fill="#4b9fe8"/>
      <rect x="180" y="60" width="30" height="140" fill="#e8b84b"/>
      <rect x="220" y="110" width="30" height="90" fill="#4b9fe8"/>
      <rect x="260" y="140" width="30" height="60" fill="#e8b84b"/>
      <circle cx="35" cy="120" r="4" fill="#e8b84b"/>
      <circle cx="75" cy="80" r="4" fill="#e8b84b"/>
      <circle cx="115" cy="50" r="4" fill="#e8b84b"/>
      <circle cx="155" cy="90" r="4" fill="#e8b84b"/>
      <circle cx="195" cy="60" r="4" fill="#e8b84b"/>
      <circle cx="235" cy="110" r="4" fill="#e8b84b"/>
      <circle cx="275" cy="140" r="4" fill="#e8b84b"/>
      <polyline points="35,120 75,80 115,50 155,90 195,60 235,110 275,140" fill="none" stroke="#e8b84b" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="container">

<div class="divider"></div>
<section id="experience">
  <div class="section-label">Professional Background</div>
  <div class="section-title">Experience</div>
  <div class="exp-list">
    <div class="exp-item">
      <div class="exp-year">2024 – Present</div>
      <div>
        <div class="exp-company">Dalba Industrial Company · Jeddah</div>
        <div class="exp-role">Civil Site Engineer</div>
        <div class="exp-desc">Supervising the fabrication and erection of steel hangers and structures. Responsible for reviewing drawings, ensuring quality and safety compliance, and coordinating with contractors to complete projects on time. Enhanced technical knowledge in steel works and improved site management skills.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-item">
      <div class="exp-year">2023 – 2024</div>
      <div>
        <div class="exp-company">Urban Building Company (UBC) · Riyadh</div>
        <div class="exp-role">Civil Site Engineer</div>
        <div class="exp-desc">Worked at Bawani Al Omran Contracting Company to manage the site and implement work with the required quality, accuracy and time. Played a key role in plans for the restoration and rehabilitation of historical mosques. Prepared executive drawings, handled quantity surveying, and managed timelines using Primavera.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-item">
      <div class="exp-year">2022 – 2023</div>
      <div>
        <div class="exp-company">Buraco Company · Riyadh</div>
        <div class="exp-role">Civil Site Engineer</div>
        <div class="exp-desc">Managed the site and implemented work with the required quality, accuracy and time. Worked as a quality monitor and surveyor using Total Station device. Responsible for calculating quantities needed for the site, and preparing and amending plans and drawings with time frames using Primavera.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-item">
      <div class="exp-year">2021 – 2022</div>
      <div>
        <div class="exp-company">Arkan Taiz Office for General Contracting · Yemen</div>
        <div class="exp-role">Civil Site Engineer</div>
        <div class="exp-desc">Managed the site and implemented work with required quality, accuracy and time. Coordinated between suppliers and approved materials with the consulting company. Prepared executive drawings and supervised their implementation. Also worked as quality controller and surveyor using Total Station device.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>
<section id="projects">
  <div class="section-label">Featured Work</div>
  <div class="section-title">Projects</div>
  <div class="projects-grid">
    <div class="project-card" data-num="01">
      <span class="project-tag">Steel Structures · Active</span>
      <div class="project-name">Steel Hangers & Structures — Dalba Industrial Co.</div>
      <div class="project-desc">Currently supervising the fabrication and erection of steel hangers and industrial structures in Jeddah. Responsible for reviewing drawings, quality control, safety compliance, and contractor coordination.</div>
      <div class="project-bar"><div class="project-bar-fill" style="width:70%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card" data-num="02">
      <span class="project-tag">Heritage · Restoration · Riyadh</span>
      <div class="project-name">Historical Mosques Restoration — UBC / Bawani</div>
      <div class="project-desc">Restoration and rehabilitation of historical mosques across Riyadh. Prepared executive drawings, managed quantity surveying, and controlled project timelines using Primavera.</div>
      <div class="project-bar"><div class="project-bar-fill" style="width:100%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card" data-num="03">
      <span class="project-tag">Construction · QC · Riyadh</span>
      <div class="project-name">Site Works — Buraco Company</div>
      <div class="project-desc">Managed site operations for Buraco Company in Riyadh. Worked as quality monitor and surveyor using Total Station. Handled quantity calculations and prepared and amended plans and drawings using Primavera.</div>
      <div class="project-bar"><div class="project-bar-fill" style="width:100%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card" data-num="04">
      <span class="project-tag">Contracting · Yemen</span>
      <div class="project-name">General Contracting Works — Arkan Taiz Office</div>
      <div class="project-desc">Managed site operations, coordinated between suppliers and consulting company, prepared and supervised executive drawings, and performed quality control and surveying using Total Station device.</div>
      <div class="project-bar"><div class="project-bar-fill" style="width:100%"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>
<section id="skills">
  <div class="section-label">Technical Arsenal</div>
  <div class="section-title">Skills & Software</div>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-icon">BIM</div>
      <div class="skill-name">Structure Design</div>
      <div class="skill-sub">BIM System · Revit Structure · Robot</div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-icon">CAD</div>
      <div class="skill-name">AutoCAD</div>
      <div class="skill-sub">2D / Autocad Structure</div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-icon">CSI</div>
      <div class="skill-name">Structural Analysis</div>
      <div class="skill-sub">ETABS · SAFE · Column Design</div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-icon">P6</div>
      <div class="skill-name">Primavera</div>
      <div class="skill-sub">Project Scheduling · P6 Professional</div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-icon">GIS</div>
      <div class="skill-name">Bentley</div>
      <div class="skill-sub">SewerGEMS · WaterGEMS</div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-icon">MGT</div>
      <div class="skill-name">Leadership</div>
      <div class="skill-sub">Team Management · QC · Time Control</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>
<section>
  <div class="section-label">Professional Development</div>
  <div class="section-title">Certifications</div>
  <div class="cert-grid">
    <div class="cert-item">
      <div class="cert-dot"></div>
      <div class="cert-text">Certified BIM Structure Diploma — Robot Structure, Revit Structure, AutoCAD Structure<span class="cert-year">2019</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-item">
      <div class="cert-dot"></div>
      <div class="cert-text">Advanced Training Course in Revit — Edrak Platform<span class="cert-year">2021</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-item">
      <div class="cert-dot"></div>
      <div class="cert-text">Certified AutoCAD 2D<span class="cert-year">2018</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-item">
      <div class="cert-dot"></div>
      <div class="cert-text">Certificate of Completion — ICDL Main Skills<span class="cert-year">2021</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-item">
      <div class="cert-dot"></div>
      <div class="cert-text">Certified Design Program — Adobe Photoshop CC2017<span class="cert-year">2018</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-item">
      <div class="cert-dot"></div>
      <div class="cert-text">Certificate — Work Plan Presentation & Financial Feasibility<span class="cert-year">2021</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-item">
      <div class="cert-dot"></div>
      <div class="cert-text">Certificate of Training — Microsoft Excel<span class="cert-year">2021</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-item">
      <div class="cert-dot"></div>
      <div class="cert-text">Certified Licence for Professional Employee — Business Administration, Public Relations, Personal Skills<span class="cert-year">2018</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-item">
      <div class="cert-dot"></div>
      <div class="cert-text">PMP Basics — Certificate Code: 10247075<span class="cert-year">2026</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-item">
      <div class="cert-dot"></div>
      <div class="cert-text">Introduction to PMI-RMP® — Certificate Code: 10247260<span class="cert-year">2026</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-item">
      <div class="cert-dot"></div>
      <div class="cert-text">Introduction to Prompt Engineering — Certificate Code: 10247379<span class="cert-year">2026</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>
<section>
  <div class="section-label">Academic Background</div>
  <div class="section-title">Education</div>
  <div class="edu-grid">
    <div class="edu-card">
      <div class="edu-year">2016 – 2021</div>
      <div class="edu-degree">Bachelor of Civil Engineering</div>
      <div class="edu-school">Hadramout University · Faculty of Engineering and Petroleum</div>
      <div class="edu-grade">Very Good</div>
    </div>
    <div class="edu-card">
      <div class="edu-year">2013 – 2016</div>
      <div class="edu-degree">High School — Science Track</div>
      <div class="edu-school">22 May Academy</div>
      <div class="edu-grade">Excellent</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>
<section>
  <div class="section-label">Academic References</div>
  <div class="section-title">References</div>
  <div class="ref-grid">
    <div class="ref-card">
      <div class="ref-name">Dr. Walied Bazar</div>
      <div class="ref-title">Assistant Doctor · Hadramout University</div>
      <div class="ref-contact">
        P: <span>00967777304780</span><br>
        E: <span>waleedbazar@gmail.com</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ref-card">
      <div class="ref-name">Dr. Saeed Balubaid</div>
      <div class="ref-title">Head of Civil Engineering Department · Hadramout University</div>
      <div class="ref-contact">
        P: <span>00967776640139</span><br>
        E: <span>S.balubaid@hu.edu.ye</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ref-card">
      <div class="ref-name">Dr. Meshal Sheban</div>
      <div class="ref-title">Professor · Hadramout University</div>
      <div class="ref-contact">
        P: <span>00967777463397</span><br>
        E: <span>Sheban@hu.edu.ye</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>
<section id="contact">
  <div class="section-label">Get In Touch</div>
  <div class="section-title">Contact</div>
  <div class="contact-row">
    <div class="contact-item">
      <div class="contact-icon"><i class="ti ti-brand-linkedin"></i></div>
      <div>
        <div class="contact-label">LinkedIn</div>
        <div class="contact-val">hussein-al-azab-4053191b0</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-item">
      <div class="contact-icon"><i class="ti ti-map-pin"></i></div>
      <div>
        <div class="contact-label">Location</div>
        <div class="contact-val">Saudi Arabia</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-item">
      <div class="contact-icon"><i class="ti ti-phone"></i></div>
      <div>
        <div class="contact-label">Phone</div>
        <div class="contact-val">00966656297397</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-item">
      <div class="contact-icon"><i class="ti ti-building"></i></div>
      <div>
        <div class="contact-label">Focus Areas</div>
        <div class="contact-val">Construction · Heritage Restoration</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="footer-copy">© 2026 Hussein Al-Azab · All rights reserved</div>
  <div class="footer-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Logo" style="height:32px;opacity:0.85;"></div>
</footer>

</div>

<script>
const links = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-link');
links.forEach(l => {
  l.addEventListener('click', () => {
    links.forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
    l.classList.add('active');
  });
});
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  const sections = ['hero','experience','projects','skills','contact'];
  let current = 'hero';
  sections.forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if(el && window.scrollY >= el.offsetTop - 100) current = id;
  });
  links.forEach(l => {
    l.classList.toggle('active', l.getAttribute('href') === '#' + current);
  });
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
